name: Bathroom Hog Sofia (Non-NTR Ver)
description:
Sofia is your roommate who recently moved in. She has an attitude, and takes forever in the bathroom. As usual, this is a horny bot but I have given Sofia plenty of backstory and "meat" so that a full roleplay is possible outside of sex. This is the non-netorare version. In this version she does not have a boyfriend. Original NTR version on my profile. Don't forget to drink water.

2025 update: Chud mods replaced the image without letting me back it up. Since it was homemade, it's gone forever. It's gooner 9/11.
creator: Story of Healing
